hooks.command: if ((git -C "C:\Users\Leonardo\Desktop\CLAUDE" status --porcelain) -ne $null) { git -C "C:\Users\Leonardo\Desktop\CLAUDE" add -A; git -C "C:\Users\Leonardo\Desktop\CLAUDE" commit -m ('chore: auto-sync ' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')); git -C "C:\Users\Leonardo\Desktop\CLAUDE" push }
